args: FoldBench-100 vs afdb-24M full train reps (1.33M)
caption: Per-candidate verdict counts vs the training-set representative DB (FoldBench-100 vs afdb-24M full train reps (1.33M)). Verdict keys off the nearest TRAIN cluster's query-normalized TM-score: redundant >= 0.9, same_fold >= 0.5, else novel_fold.
